name: ruby-glu

description:
Glu bindings for ruby
This package contains Glu bindings for ruby. It works in tandem with opengl.

When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-glu with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-glu --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
